title: CA LCFS Q2 2024: Credits Surge by 12.41% in Q2 2024 as Renewable Diesel Leads the Growth
content:
Key Takeaways

  • In Q2 2024, credits experienced a significant 12.41% increase from the previous quarter, with Renewable Diesel leading this growth, followed by Bio CNG and Ethanol.
  • Renewable Diesel alone saw a 10.92% rise in credits, while Alternative Jet Fuel credits increased by 1.06x, alongwith a 1.20x boost in fuel volume.
  • Deficits also rose by 6.18%, with CARBOB accounting for the highest share, adding up to 5.16 million deficits.
  • Additionally, the shift to alternative fuels contributed to an 11.67% reduction in petroleum fuel usage, highlighting progress in reducing gasoline consumption.
author: Mansift Kaur
